name: codex-sparkompass
description: Deutschsprachige Context-Control-Plane für sparsamere, belegbare Codex-Workflows.

scripts.evidence-audit: node ./bin/codex-sparkompass.mjs evidence-audit . --goal "Codex Sparkompass evidence audit" --file src/context-plan.mjs
scripts.ablation-audit: node ./bin/codex-sparkompass.mjs ablation-audit . --goal "Codex Sparkompass ablation audit" --file src/context-plan.mjs --expect buildContextPlan --max-units 120
scripts.slim: node ./bin/codex-sparkompass.mjs slim . --goal "Codex Sparkompass slimming plan" --file src/context-plan.mjs --expect buildContextPlan --max-units 120 --max-moves 24
scripts.lint: node --check ./bin/*.mjs && node --check ./src/*.mjs && node --check ./scripts/*.mjs && node --check ./test/*.mjs && node --check ./plugins/codex-sparkompass/scripts/*.mjs && node --check ./plugins/codex-sparkompass/dist/*.mjs
scripts.check: npm run build:plugin && npm run lint && npm test && npm run dogfood && npm run benchmark && npm run scorecard && npm run evidence-audit && npm run ablation-audit && npm run slim && npm run doctor-overhead && npm run package-audit && npm run package-smoke && npm run plugin-smoke && npm run release-audit

author: Codex Sparkompass Contributors
